summary.goal: To implement a secure configuration split pattern to separate shared settings from per-developer secrets in the .llmgraph/ directory.
decisions: Used a PartialConfig overlay struct with all Option<T> fields to represent config.local.toml, avoiding serde_json Value merging and keeping merge logic explicit.
Added api_key: Option<String> to LlmConfig, skipping serialization so it never appears in config.toml output.

rejected_approaches.reason: Loses type safety and makes the merge logic opaque.

rejected_approaches.description: Single config file with a separate secrets file for just the key
rejected_approaches.reason: Less flexible, doesn't allow overriding any config value locally.
